title: senecio spatulatus
intro: Senecio spatulatus, also known as Devil's Claw or Harpagophytum procumbens, is a plant native to southern Africa and belongs to the Asteraceae family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its roots, which contain harpagoside and other iridoid glycosides. The health benefits of Senecio spatulatus include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as aiding in the treatment of arthritis, gout, and other conditions. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, capsules, and tinctures, making it accessible for those seeking natural remedies.
